description: Partial score with Chinese-English mixed content

input.question: Explain the difference between stack and heap memory allocation.
input.rubric: 评分标准：1)Stack是LIFO结构，自动管理，速度快 2)Heap是动态分配，需手动管理(或GC) 3)Stack存储局部变量和函数调用，Heap存储动态分配的对象 4)各自的优缺点和适用场景
input.student_answer: Stack memory is like a stack of plates - last in, first out. It's very fast because the CPU just moves a pointer. 局部变量都放在stack上。Heap就是用malloc或new分配的内存，比较慢。I think heap is bigger than stack but I'm not sure about the details of garbage collection.

concept_accuracy_evidence: 正确提到Stack速度快（CPU指针移动）
正确提到局部变量在stack上
reasoning_quality_evidence: Stack的类比(plates)有助于理解但不够严谨
未深入分析速度差异的原因
knowledge_coverage_evidence: 未详细讨论优缺点和适用场景
knowledge_integration_evidence: 尝试比较Stack和Heap但不够深入
未将内存管理与程序设计决策联系起来
evidence.overall_observation: 学生对Stack有较好理解，对Heap的理解较浅，缺乏深入比较和应用场景分析。

concept_accuracy.justification: 多数概念正确但对GC理解不确定

reasoning_quality.justification: 有推理尝试但不够深入

knowledge_integration.justification: 有比较尝试但联系不够紧密
